---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Contact

[I am always open to conversations about nutrition, food safety, operations, or collaboration.]{.page-subtitle}
:::

::: {.content-area}

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-card}
### Get in Touch

::: {.contact-item-row}
::: {.contact-icon}
📧
:::
::: {}
::: {.contact-label}
Email
:::
::: {.contact-value}
[vasalga29\@gmail.com](mailto:vasalga29@gmail.com)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.contact-item-row}
::: {.contact-icon}
💼
:::
::: {}
::: {.contact-label}
LinkedIn
:::
::: {.contact-value}
[linkedin.com/in/vanessamarques-nutrition-operations](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vanessamarques-nutrition-operations)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.contact-item-row}
::: {.contact-icon}
📍
:::
::: {}
::: {.contact-label}
Location
:::
::: {.contact-value}
Coquitlam, BC, Canada
:::
:::
:::

::: {.contact-item-row}
::: {.contact-icon}
🌐
:::
::: {}
::: {.contact-label}
Languages
:::
::: {.contact-value}
Portuguese · English · Spanish
:::
:::
:::

::: {.availability-badge}
::: {.avail-dot}
:::
Open to Opportunities
:::
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### What I'm Looking For

I am open to roles and partnerships in the following areas:

**In Canada (BC):**
- Food service operations management
- Nutrition consulting or dietetic assistant roles
- Food safety coordination and compliance
- Community nutrition programs

**Professionally / Remotely:**
- Nutrition content writing and education
- Sports nutrition consulting


**Collaborations:**
- Healthcare organisations seeking nutrition expertise
- Startups at the intersection of food, tech, and health
- MBA peers interested in food systems, operations, or AI

---

::: {style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--mid);font-style:italic;margin-top:0.5rem;"}
I typically respond within 1–2 business days. I look forward to connecting!
:::
:::

:::

---
